items.claim: Adrian Yanez is a lock to defeat Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Adrian Yanez, yeah, I think Adrian Yanez is a lock against Cody.

items.claim: Michael Chandler acts as a punching bag in his fights.
items.quote: Chandler's a little bit of a punching bag out there, you know?

items.claim: Conor McGregor possesses good takedown defense.
Max Holloway has good takedown defense.
items.quote: Max Holloway has good takedown defense.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is not a wrestler.
items.quote: Conor McGregor is not a wrestler.

items.claim: If Conor McGregor attempts to wrestle Max Holloway, he will gas out.
items.quote: If Conor McGregor goes out there and goes straight Dagestan on Max Holloway, he's going to gas out.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka frequently wins or loses by split decision.
items.quote: Kai Kamaka is the king of split decisions.
